[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101011 4
1 0111010 4
2 0011111 5
3 1110100 4
4 1001101 4
5 0111011 5
6 0000000 a
7 0111001 4

01 10 0001001 2
12 21 0001011 3
23 32 0101010 3
34 43 0011010 3
45 54 0010100 2
56 65 1000100 2
67 76 0001001 2
70 07 0111001 4 match 7

13 31 0001010 2

35 53 0110000 2
46 64 0001101 3

71 17 0001011 3

36 63 0001000 1

50 05 0110000 2
61 16 1001101 4 match 4
72 27 0101011 4 match 0

26 62 0001001 2
